Description: Provides the full function designation name with preceding sign, e.g. "=A.UA1.UA2".
Provides the full location designation names with preceding sign, e.g. "+O.UO1.UO2".
Provides the full functional assignment with preceding sign.
Provides the full installation site with preceding sign.

Designation: Higher-level function number with preceding sign

Description: Provides the full product aspect with preceding sign, e.g. "U-UA1-UA2".
Provides the identifying device tag without the project structures.

Designation: DT (identifying, without project structures, with preceding sign)
Description: Provides the identifying device tag without the project structures, but with information about the preceding sign.
